releaseNotes: Brings the dual-spoof launcher to full feature parity with codex-relay master (MIT, 49 ★). Adds multimodal content translation: input_image / image_url parts now round-trip as Chat-Completions image_url shape, so vision-capable models (Kimi-K2-VL etc.) actually see attached images. Adds an in-memory SessionStore for response_id history and reasoning_content round-trip — Codex's previous_response_id continuation works, and thinking models (DeepSeek-V4-Pro, Kimi-K2.6) don't lose context across tool-call turns. Smoke test covers 47 scenarios.
